name: Farmers And Drovers Bank
description_short: Farmers and Drovers Bank is a traditional banking institution offering checking, savings, mobile banking, and credit card services with fraud protection measures.
description_long:
Farmers and Drovers Bank operates as a traditional financial institution providing core banking services to consumers and businesses. The bank maintains an online presence through its website at farmersanddrovers.com and emphasizes accessibility through digital channels.

The bank offers a range of standard banking products including deposit accounts, debit cards, credit cards for both personal and business use, mobile banking access, and mobile check deposit functionality. Their digital platform allows customers to manage accounts, conduct bill pay operations, and access card services remotely through smartphones, tablets, and online portals. The institution maintains dedicated customer support lines for specific needs, including separate numbers for debit card disputes (844-202-5070) and card management issues like travel restrictions or lost cards (833-719-0353).

Farmers and Drovers Bank distinguishes itself through explicit fraud protection messaging and transparency about information security. The bank clearly communicates that it will never request personal or account information during login processes or unsolicited phone contacts, and directs customers to fraud protection resources. This emphasis on customer security appears central to their service positioning.

As a traditional bank, Farmers and Drovers Bank serves customers seeking conventional banking relationships with digital conveniences. However, the website content is limited and does not provide detailed information about account features, fee structures, interest rates, minimum balance requirements, or specific product differentiators. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly or visit their full website for comprehensive product details and comparison against other regional or national banking options. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking via smartphone and tablet
pros: Mobile banking access available 24/7 for account management and bill pay
Mobile deposit feature allows check deposits via smartphone or scanner without visiting a branch
Separate dedicated phone lines for different card services (disputes vs. travel/lost card issues)
Online credit card portal for both consumer and business credit cards
Explicit fraud protection messaging and commitment to never request personal information unsolicited
Multi-channel access including mobile apps and online platforms
cons: Limited website information about account types, fees, interest rates, and minimum balance requirements
No details provided about CD offerings, savings account rates, or loan products beyond credit cards
Website does not specify geographic service areas or branch locations
No information about business account features or commercial lending capabilities despite mentioning business credit cards

contact.address: 201 W Main St, Council Grove, KS 66846

best_for: Customers seeking traditional banking with mobile and online access capabilities
Small business owners needing business credit card and deposit services
Consumers wanting fraud-protected debit card services with dedicated support lines
diagnosis: Farmers and Drovers Bank is best for traditional banking customers who want digital convenience without complexity, with emphasis on mobile and online account management. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal product details, so customers must contact the bank directly to compare features, rates, and fees against competitor offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 201 W Main St, Council Grove, KS 66846
